source.name: Ryoko's Guide to the Yokai Realms
source.author: Mohammed Bellafquih, William Earl, Max Wartelle
source.artist: Mohammed Bellafquih, Kwanpo "Ari" Cheng, Phan Tuan Dat, Aleksa Drageljevic, Martin Kirby-Jackson, Roman Kuzmin, Rastislav Le, Michelle Mueller, Richard Nguyen, Mukhlis "Sinlaire" Nur, Ognjen Sporin, Rajaa Al-Subairi, Chaouki "Ciao" Titouhi, Sou-haib Zekri
